message:
fix: remove hardcoded severity/priority from refinery anomalies (gt-9xbg)

ZFC violation: detectQueueAnomalies was classifying severity (critical/warning)
and createConflictResolutionTaskForMR was boosting priority (P2->P1->P0).
Both are policy decisions that belong to agents, not Go code.

Changes:
- Remove Severity field from MRAnomaly struct — agents classify from type + age
- Remove priority boost in conflict resolution task — pass raw mr.Priority
- Remove unused staleClaimCriticalAfter constant
- Update anomaly display format (no severity column)
- Update tests to verify raw data instead of severity classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: gastown/refinery
Rig: gastown
Role: refinery
